session.user:
Run the following command and report results: uv run pytest tests/tui/screens/test_objective_nodes_screen.py tests/tui/screens/test_launch_screen.py tests/tui/commands/ -x -v
Report all test results including pass/fail counts and any error messages.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on ObjectiveNodesScreen, LaunchScreen, and command tests with verbose output

session.tool_result:
============================= test session starts ============================== platform linux -- Python 3.13.12, pytest-9.0.2, pluggy-1.6.0 rootdir: /home/runner/work/erk/erk configfile: pyproject.toml plugins: anyio-4.12.1, cov-7.0.0, xdist-3.8.0, asyncio-1.3.0 asyncio: mode=Mode.AUTO, debug=False, asyncio_default_fixture_loop_scope=function, asyncio_default_test_loop_scope=function collected 139 items
tests/tui/screens/test_objective_nodes_screen.py .............. [ 10%] tests/tui/screens/test_launch_screen.py ....... [ 15%] tests/tui/commands/test_execute_command.py ....................... [ 31%] tests/tui/commands/test_node_command_provider.py .... [ 34%] tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py .................................... [ 60%] ....................................................... [100%]
============================= 139 passed in 0.75s ==============================
session.assistant:
pytest passed: All 139 tests passed in 0.75s
**Test Summary:** - **Total**: 139 passed - **Files tested**: - `tests/tui/screens/test_objective_nodes_screen.py`: 14 passed - `tests/tui/screens/test_launch_screen.py`: 7 passed - `tests/tui/commands/test_execute_command.py`: 23 passed - `tests/tui/commands/test_node_command_provider.py`: 4 passed - `tests/tui/commands/test_registry.py`: 91 passed - **Exit code**: 0 (success)
All tests passed without errors.
